channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Sheriff identifies body found in Tampa Bay as 2nd missing student from Bangladesh
item.description: A Florida sheriff says a body found in Tampa Bay has been identified as the second missing University of South Florida doctoral student from Bangladesh.

item.title: A person of interest is in custody after 2 U.S. Bank employees were killed in a Kentucky robbery
Habitat for Humanity is developing a new Atlanta community with help from the Carters’ initiative
